# SwadKart

SwadKart is a production-grade multi-vendor food delivery platform with a 4-role ecosystem: customers, restaurants, delivery drivers, and admins. Built with React 19, Node.js 22, Express 5, MongoDB, Socket.IO, and Redis.

## Key Features
- AI chatbot with Groq LLM for food recommendations
- Voice search in English and Hindi
- Real-time GPS order tracking
- Biometric authentication (WebAuthn)
- Razorpay payments
- PWA with offline support
- Group ordering and table reservations
- SwadPass subscription program

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, PWA
- Backend: Node.js 22, Express 5, MongoDB, Redis
- AI: Groq LLM, Web Speech API
- Infrastructure: Vercel (frontend), Render (backend)

## Core Pages
- Home: https://swadkart.vercel.app/
- Restaurants: https://swadkart.vercel.app/restaurants
- Cart: https://swadkart.vercel.app/cart
- Orders: https://swadkart.vercel.app/orders
- Profile: https://swadkart.vercel.app/profile
- Contact: https://swadkart.vercel.app/contact
- FAQ: https://swadkart.vercel.app/faq
- About: https://swadkart.vercel.app/about
- SwadPass: https://swadkart.vercel.app/swadpass
- Rewards: https://swadkart.vercel.app/rewards
